title: miqveh #4723
definition:
n m
 1) hope
    1a) hope
    1b) ground of hope
    1c) things hoped for, outcome
 2) collection, collected mass

 n pr m
 3) (CLBL) Kue, a place in Cilicia from which Solomon imported horses
